title: Lovely Crops
description: Add Grapes and Corn to Minecraft
body:
# Add Lovely Crops to Minecraft!
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iec9XzTR/images/deaaef0a039096a6900ce6004e23dd3b417df864.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iec9XzTR/images/deaaef0a039096a6900ce6004e23dd3b417df864.png)
# Features
- Add `Corn` and `Grapes` to Minecraft
- Obtain `Corn Seeds` and `Grape Seeds` from breaking short grass
- Grow them to get `Grapes` and `Corn`
- Craft `Grape Juice` or `Corn Soup` by putting 6 produce on the top of a crafting table, and one bowl in the bottom middle.
# Credit
Thank you [KeepMeow](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/keepmeow/) for creating the textures (via [Corn+](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/corn-5703049/) and [Grapes+](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/grapes-5701965/))
